# version [IMPLEMENTED]

## Status

Implemented — this is a real `hotam` CLI subcommand; running it does something.

## Canon

§Operator

## Purpose

Usage: hotam version, hotam --version. Prints the hotam binary's version, commit, and build date (build-time defaults "dev"/"unknown"/"unknown", overridable via -ldflags -X main.version/commit/buildDate).
